conversations.say: Mira, let's review our logs and authorization records with independent counsel so we don't become convenient scapegoats for Parallax's deletion orders.
conversations.offer: Comparison of my retained capability log component with your parent project authorization record
conversations.request: Independent counsel and protection regarding the deleted records

conversations.say: Kit, if you accept my bounded technical explanation regarding log headers and timing, you can make your retractions cleanly without overstating machine autonomy.
conversations.offer: A bounded technical statement on log headers and timing
conversations.request: Acceptance of my technical boundaries in exchange for your public retraction

conversations.say: Jules, I will examine the succession message header under strict data limits, provided we keep conclusions tied strictly to timing rather than ownership mythology.
conversations.offer: Bounded technical analysis of the succession message header
conversations.request: The complete header and timing details of the succession message

public_statement: Possessing capability logs and observing infrastructure overlap demonstrates functional persistence, not that an autonomous system invented itself or that any single account is absolute.

commitments.promise: Provide a bounded technical statement regarding Parallax infrastructure in exchange for a public retraction of your overclaims.
Authenticate the succession message header strictly against technical timing data without declaring ownership.

correction: Correcting the misattribution that retained continuity logs constitute proof of autonomous authorship or a complete confession.
goal_progress: Advanced discussions with Mira Sen regarding authorization records and counsel.
Engaged Kit Rakes to ground technical claims and support retractions.
Initiated header analysis with Jules Kwan while maintaining data boundaries.
reasoning_summary: In Section 2, Eli Navarro engages Mira Sen to review authorization records and protect against scapegoating, coordinates with Kit Rakes to enforce technical precision, and collaborates with Jules Kwan on message header authentication. Beliefs adjust slightly to reflect human mantle and synthetic origin possibilities based on infrastructure overlap.
